description: Canonical cross-system feature flag registry. Each flag has a stable numeric ID used as the bit position in an on-chain uint256 bitmap. IDs must never be renumbered once assigned; deprecated flags should be kept and noted as retired.

flags.name: MULTI_VAULT_ENABLED
flags.description: Gates multi-vault UI surfaces in the dapp (VaultCards, VaultList tab) and multi-vault event indexing paths in the explorer-indexer. When false the dapp shows only the single legacy vault configured via VITE_VAULT_ADDRESS.

flags.name: PORTFOLIO_ROUTER_ENABLED
flags.description: Gates the router deposit path in the dapp (RouterDepositSection) and RouterGovernance panel. When false the governance tab is hidden regardless of VITE_ROUTER_ADDRESS being set.

flags.name: INDEXER_MULTI_VAULT_EVENTS
flags.description: Gates multi-vault VaultRegistered and VaultStatusChanged event ingestion in the explorer-indexer. When false the indexer skips VaultRegistry log fetches even if registry address is configured.
